---
title: "Herniated Disc Exercises"
date: "2017-09-03"
categories: []
slug: "herniated-disc-exercises"
---
Found a really nice set of five simple exercises for treating herniated or bulging discs. The exercises are:

1.  Cat-cow
2.  Bird-dog
3.  Lying prone face down with elbows tucked in under your sides
4.  Superman - with your arms either by your side, or folded behind your head, or stretched out in front
5.  Cobra or Mackenzie press-ups.

<https://youtu.be/b1_uxJRpQRM>
